title: DonutRegion
description: Adds the /donutregion command, which shows your current Overworld region and its mapped region number.
body:
DonutRegion is a lightweight Fabric client-side mod made for DonutSMP.
It adds the /donutregion command, which shows you your current region and region number on the official Donut SMP map.

🌍 Works in the Overworld (Nether & End are marked as unmapped).
📌 Displays both the region ID and its name (NA East, EU Central, Asia, etc.).
⚡ Client-side only — no server installation required.

This mod works with the help of Miep’s region mapping, making it easier than ever to know exactly where you are on Donut SMP without needing to alt-tab to external maps.![Miep's donutsmp region mapping](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c55ba63d6f8f2bce1a6cc65f14121a5801a76016_0.webp)
